description: Legal record (#81) in a court register/pinqas from a Karaite beit din in Cairo (on f. 28r-v of Yevr.-Arab. I 328). Dated 19 [Av 5325 AM] (1565 CE), with the scribe implying that the month and year are the same as the previous shelfmark. Release agreement between the recently divorced couple ʿAbd al-Ḥaqq b. Shemuʾel known as al-Ḥawwāsh and Estīta bt. Moshe al-Kohen, known as פליפל(?). Both parties release each other from any further monetary and material claims beyond the 62 medin that ʿAbd al-Ḥaqq agrees to pay his wife in monthly installments of 4 medin. The couple had divorced that same day. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
